subject: (48hrs) what you need to know
body:
Mozination -

Are you ready for Saturday 9am PT/12pm ET?

Here's your 100M Money Models pre-launch checklist:

Step 1:

Mark your Calendar for Saturday, August 16th, at 9 AM PT / 12 PM ET

Step 2:

We've already sold multiple truckloads of books. So, if you want to upgrade to VIP, get a guaranteed book, first-in-line shipping, a chance to win a day with me at the Acquisition HQ in Vegas* register & grab yours now.

Step 3:

For the best live experience, desktop is best.

Step 4:

Send this email to a friend if you want them to come and get the secret project I've been working on for a year (Hint: it's better than an NFT and less than a Bitcoin and every single person who shows up live gets one).

Reminders:

- If you join LIVE, you will get my Secret Project - free.

- And - for VIPs (which you can now get as a free upgrade when you pre-order), you'll automatically get your chance to win a day with me in Vegas - but you gotta be there live!

Also, as of right now, we have over 458,751 people registered for this insane Launch Event.

IMPORTANT: Due to larger volumes than expected, it is best to join 12-17 minutes early so you don't get stuck in line waiting to get in. (and miss the first 5-10 minutes).

See you Saturday.

Alex

PS - We have had a lot of people ask to send out a calendar invite so it's easier to join on Aug 16 for your timezone.

Btw - to my Aussies and Kiwis - y'all rock. Your parties are legendary. The only question is whether you're partying all night or waking up early...

Book Launch Start by TIMEZONE on Aug 16:

North America - Pacific Time (PST) 9:00 AM, Mountain Time (MST) 10:00 AM, Central Time (CST) 11:00 AM, Eastern Time (EST) 12:00 PM (noon), Atlantic Time (AST) 1:00 PM, Newfoundland Time (NST) 1:30 PM

South America - Argentina (ART) 2:00 PM, Brazil (BRT) 2:00 PM, Chile (CLT) 1:00 PM, Colombia (COT) 12:00 PM

Europe - UK (GMT) 5:00 PM, Central Europe (CET) 6:00 PM, Eastern Europe (EET) 7:00 PM, Russia (MSK) 8:00 PM

Africa - West Africa (WAT) 6:00 PM, Central Africa (CAT) 7:00 PM, East Africa (EAT) 8:00 PM

Asia - India (IST) 10:30 PM, Pakistan (PKT) 10:00 PM, Bangladesh (BST) 11:00 PM, Thailand (ICT) 12:00 AM (next day), China (CST) 1:00 AM (next day), Japan (JST) 2:00 AM (next day), South Korea (KST) 2:00 AM (next day)

Australia & Oceania - Perth (AWST) 1:00 AM (next day), Adelaide (ACDT) 3:30 AM (next day), Sydney/Melbourne (AEDT) 4:00 AM (next day), New Zealand (NZDT) 6:00 AM (next day)
